title: Lands (Ground Rent, Fees and Charges) Regulations, 2006

sections.heading: 2. The ground rents as set out in the First Schedule shall be
sections.text:
Ground rent
payable by persons holding land specified in that Schedule.

sections.heading: The fees and charges are set out in the Second Schedule Fees and
sections.text:
shall be payable in respect of transactions in land specified in that charges
Schedule.
